name: Bonds
description: Debt securities where you lend money to governments or corporations in exchange for regular interest payments and return of principal at maturity.
advantages: Priority over stockholders in case of bankruptcy
disadvantages: Lower returns compared to stocks over long term
Interest rate risk - bond prices fall when rates rise
Credit risk - issuer may default on payments
Inflation can erode purchasing power of fixed payments
Less liquid than stocks in some cases
Complexity in understanding bond pricing and yields
